titleStmt.title: SII 34.288: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 288. Tiruvaranguḷam, Alangudi Taluk, Pudukkottai District. On the wall of the west verandah of the first prākāra in the Haratīrthēśvara temple.

summary.p: This refers to the decision to end the enmity that was existing between two groups of araiyas, Ayilarāyaṉ and his brothers of a paḍaippaṟṟu village in Kavi-nāḍu on the one hand and Piḷḷāṉ Aḻagiyachōḻa-nāḍāḻvāṉ and Aḍaikkalavaṉ of Pudukkōṭṭai on the other. The feuding groups agreed mutually not to continue the enmity that had existed from the time of their fathers. If the decision is not adhered to, the defaulting member should give some land to the temple and also pay a heavy fine to the rulers (irāja-daṇḍam). They also decided to meet the expenses of the meeting of the devotees (mayēśuras) who would gather to enquire the defaulters.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī vīrapāṇṭiya tEvaṟku yāṇṭu 3 10 9 Āvatu rāca vaḷa nāṭṭu valla nāṭṭu tirua
raṉkuḷamuṭaiya nāyiṉār tirukkōyil tāṉattārum Ūrārum muṉpāka cōḻavaḷanāṭṭuk kaviṉāṭṭup paṭaippa
maṅkalattaraiyakaḷil civalōkamuṭaiyāṉ kilaraiyaṉum Ivan tampi yilayarāyaṉum putukkōṭṭai Araiyakaḷ piḷḷāṉ
Aḻakiya cōḻa nāṭāḻvāṉum Iṉpaṉ makaṉ Aṭaikkalavaṉum Emmilicaintu tirumalaiyiṟ kallu veṭṭiṉa paricāvatu muṉṉāḷ Eṅkaḷ takappaṉ
mārāliṭṭap pakai yiraṇṭukkum paḻippaṭṭukkiṭakkum pakaiyai nāṅkaḷ Eṅkaḷil porunti cantiṟātittavaraikku collak kaṭava
tallaveṉṟu Iraṇṭutiṟattārum kūṭaniṉṟu tirumalaiyiṟkalluveṭṭuvittapaṭi Intappiḷḷān Aḻakiya cōḻa nāṭāḻvāṉum Aṭaikkalavaṉu
nāṅkaḷ Eṅkaḷil porunti Orutti makkaḷāy Ōrampalattilēyiruntu Oruta laiyilē paṭaice ttuppōtakkaṭa
vōmākavum Ippaṭi [camatittu Aḻakiyacōḻa nāṭāḻvāṉaiyum Aṭaikkalavaṉaiyum teṟkilaraiyaṉ Ayilarāyaṉ Ivarkaḷ Oru viṉai kuṟaḷaiyil
kollutal kuttutal kutal ceytāṟ peruñcantipaṭi kaviṉāṭṭu Iṟaiyili Añcu mānilam māṟaṉ maṅkalattil tiraḷ vayakkal kaṭa
tēvaṉ vayal teṟkiṟ tēvaṉ vayakkal putuvayaliṟ paḷḷar cey Acci vayakkal Iṟaiyuṭpaṭa Añcumānilam nallaṉā lattāṟki
vāṟtu tiraṇṭa māyēcurakkūṭṭiyum viṭṭu tirukkūṭṭi Aḻivu Āyiram paṇamum teṇṭamuṅ kuṭukka kaṭavōmākavum Itu ḻintu Inta te
Ayalayarāyaṉai Aḻakiya cōḻanāṭāḻvāṉum Aṭaikkalavaṉum kollutal kuttutal viṉaikuṟaḷai] ceyyutal
Eṅkaḷ kāṇi Āna māṟamaṅkalattu vayalil nampaṉ vayakkal
tirumēṉiyum vāṟtu tiraṇṭa māyēcuṟaṟku paṭiyum viṭṭu tirukkūṭṭa Aḻivu Āyirappaṇamum Irāca teṇṭamuṅ kuṭuttu
mākavum kallunāṭṭum poḻutu tānattār tāṅkaḷē muḻayum veṭṭi nāṭṭa taṅkaḷ tēva makkaḷai ku
Ippaṭi camatittu tirumalaiyil kalluveṭṭi Itu ki Araiyaṉum Ayilayarāyaṉum Aḻakiya cōḻanāṭāḻ
kalveṭṭuppaṭi Eḻutiṉēṉ Ivai pālaiyūruṭaiyāṉ kaṇṇuṭaiyār muṉaiyataraiya Eḻuttu
l pakaḻiyān kaṇapati ciṟukulattaraiyaṉ Eḻuttu putukkōṭṭaiyil Aḻakiya cōḻanāṭāḻvāṉ koḻunti mūkkaṉum Inta
Aṟivēṉ Ippaṭikku Aṟivēṉ
Digital edition of SII 34.288 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
